contests.title: Refer & Earn
contests.description: Share your code. They get 25% bonus Blue Buzz, you get Membership perks and Blue Buzz for each Buzz purchase they make.

contests.title: 2 for 1 Generations Extended
contests.description: We're extending the event! On **select models**, you'll now get **two images for the price of one** - same Buzz, double the output.
